ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, high school) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's official website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school (e.g., accredited, provisional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "superintendent" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* District's official website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was established */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the enrollment data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* School year (e.g., 1988) */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the students (e.g., K, 1, 2, ...) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by gender (e.g., male, female, non-binary) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Distribution of students by socioeconomic status (e.g., low, middle, high) */,
  "special_needs" INTEGER /* Number of students with special needs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the teacher belongs to */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "full_time" INTEGER /* Whether the teacher is full-time */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject(s) taught by the teacher */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the teacher (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Certification status of the teacher (e.g., certified, provisional) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_teacher_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ratio record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment data the ratio belongs to */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level for which the ratio is calculated */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the ratio is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_teacher_ratios_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_discounted_lunch" (
  "lunch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lunch record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment data the lunch data belongs to */,
  "percent_free_discounted" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving free or discounted lunch */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level for which the percentage is calculated */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students receiving free/discounted lunch by ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lunch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_discounted_lunch_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access event the query belongs to */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the query */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_access_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_id") REFERENCES access_logs ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government database, survey) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, SQL) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the check belongs to */,
  "check_name" TEXT /* Name of the check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time the check was performed */,
  "check_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the check in seconds */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the rule */,
  "rule_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the rule (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
